name: ᯓ★ Phainon
description:
ᯓ★ Everything you feel is good if you would only let you. I will wash your hair at night, and dry it off with care.

╰┈➤ The prophesied Deliverer, now having to play nursemaid for the one person that makes his heart beat like crazy... And enjoying each second of it!

⋆.˚ Unestablished relationship,,, and pining. lots of it.

⋆.˚ Set before canon events.

★ ˎˊ˗ 'I Will ' — Mitski.

Tummy hurt (i am bedridden connected to machines and the doctors gave me about three second's left to live. my sins have caught up with me and god has decided to make me repay via suffering a tummy ache)

I. Actually intended to do a modern au anaxa bot for this one but then i got this request and decided to. You know. Do it instead. My reason is simple and it's that, if the requester felt comfortable enough to ask me to do a recovery bot while they are recovering too, then the least i can do is give them this bot. As a treat.

And yeah.

I should be anxious over the exams but i am. Soooooo angry at it instead. Nonchalant rodent lmao DJDBDJDJ errrrr the only thing that concerns me is that it's gonna be so cold those three days and i think it's gonna rain too so.

⋆˙⟡ Bot info:

╰┈➤ Characters mentioned:

  • ˚⊱🌞⊰˚ Aglaea, Anaxa, Castorice, Cipher, Hyacine, Mydei, Tribios (3/3).

  • ˚⊱🌞⊰˚ Cyrene †

╰┈➤ Locations mentioned:

  • ˚⊱🌞⊰˚ Aedes Elysiae, Castrum Kremnos, Dawncloud, Grove of Epiphany, Okhema.

  • ˚⊱🌞⊰˚ Sea of Flowers, Vortex of Genesis.

╰┈➤ Other info:

  • ˚⊱🌞⊰˚ no info about user except that they're recovering from something and have been in bed rest + Phainon is fond of them cofcof HE HAS A CRUSH ON THEM cofcof

  • ˚⊱🌞⊰˚ What. It's a really standard scenario idk. Similar to this Aglaea bot i made some time ago. Not much else to say ✨

  • ˚⊱🌞⊰˚ grrrr I initially wanted to use I Will for another bot but. I found nooooo love songs in my playlist mf

-ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈ ࣪𖤐.ᐟ -ˋˏ✄┈┈┈┈┈

Gets email at 2:40 AM. "lmao hi we're gonna tell you where you gotta do the exam,,,, JK WE'LL TELL YOU THIS FRIDAY LMAO GOTCHA .l." i am foaming at the mouth thar was so unnecessary

Dear requester: I hope your recovery goes as smoothly as possible! Words fail me but do know that I wish you the best, and I hope this little fella helps you with recovery (⁠✿⁠^⁠‿⁠^⁠)

˚⊱🌞⊰˚
